prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile is a DIFFERENT huge towering object standing FREE on a small flat patch of pale sandy beach — the object itself rises straight up and IS the sprite. Do NOT put it on a raised block, cube, column, box, crate or pedestal, and do NOT draw the ground as a tall raised cube: just a small low patch at the base, everything else transparent. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a towering rock arch by the shore 2) a towering dune crowned with grass 3) a giant saguaro cactus 4) a colossal sea-stack rock 5) a weathered stone obelisk in the sand 6) a tall stilted beach lighthouse 7) a towering coconut palm 8) a massive driftwood sculpture 9) a giant windswept palm 10) a grand carved tiki totem. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
